M5.name: Autotex M5
M5.title: M5 Premium Conventional Wiper Blade
M5.subtitle: 10"–28" · J-hook, pin, saddle
M5.description: Premium conventional wiper blade with all-steel frame and natural rubber element. Fits J-hook, pin, and saddle arms. Replaces Anco, Trico, and Bosch.

M6.name: Autotex M6
M6.title: M6 Premium+ Conventional Wiper Blade
M6.subtitle: 13"–28" · J-hook, top lock
M6.description: Premium+ conventional blade with upgraded rubber compound and all-steel frame. Fits J-hook and top lock arms. Replaces Anco, Trico, and Bosch.

CLX.name: Clix Original
CLX.title: Clix Original Beam Wiper Blade
CLX.subtitle: 14"–32" · Click-on starter clips
CLX.description: Click-on installation beam blade. Starter clips fit virtually all vehicles. All-season streak-free performance.

CLX-SP.name: Clix Silicone+
CLX-SP.title: Clix Silicone+ Beam Wiper Blade
CLX-SP.subtitle: 14"–28" · Silicone, click-on
CLX-SP.description: Click-on beam blade with silicone rubber element for longer life and quieter wiping. All-season performance.

R1.name: Autotex R1
R1.title: R1 Universal Rear Wiper Blade
R1.subtitle: 8"–16" · Multi-connector
R1.description: Universal rear wiper blade fits 90%+ of rear arms. Multiple connectors included. Natural rubber, all-season.

QFR.name: Autotex QFR
QFR.title: QFR Quick Fit Rear Wiper Blade
QFR.subtitle: 11"–16" · 5 connector styles
QFR.description: Rear blade in five connector styles: RL2, RL3, Slide, ClawD, and ClawE. Natural rubber. Rear window applications only.

71.name: Autotex 71 Series
71.title: 71 Series Narrow Saddle Flat Heavy Duty
71.subtitle: 11"–22" · 5mm & 6mm saddle
71.description: Flat heavy-duty blade for 5mm and 6mm narrow saddle arms on commercial trucks, transit buses, and specialty vehicles. All hardware included.

72.name: Autotex 72 Series
72.title: 72 Series Narrow Saddle Curved Heavy Duty
72.subtitle: 15"–24" · 5mm & 6mm saddle
72.description: Curved heavy-duty blade for 5mm and 6mm narrow saddle arms on trucks, buses, and RVs with curved windshields. All hardware included.

74.name: Autotex 74 Series
74.title: 74 Series Jumbo Hook Heavy Duty
74.subtitle: 24"–32" · 12x4 jumbo hook
74.description: Heavy-duty blade for 12x4 jumbo hook arms on Class A RVs and delivery trucks. Adapters for J-hook and saddle included.

78.name: Autotex 78 Series
78.title: 78 Series Saddle Mount Heavy Duty
78.subtitle: 12"–46" · 14mm & 17mm saddle
78.description: Saddle-mount heavy-duty blade for 14mm and 17mm saddle arms. School buses, transit coaches, Class A RVs, and commercial trucks.

M1.name: Autotex M1 Marine
M1.title: M1 Marine Stainless Steel Wiper Blade
M1.subtitle: 9"–28" · Stainless frame
M1.description: Marine wiper built for saltwater environments. Rust-resistant stainless steel frame and natural rubber element.
